title: A Student's Daily Routine
learningGoal: The learner will read a paragraph describing a daily routine, correctly identifying times (ni), locations of actions (de), and direct objects (wo).
instructions: Read the following diary entry describing a student's daily routine. Pay close attention to the particles attached to times, places, and objects. Use the glossary if you forget a word.

contentItems.text: Notice how the subject 'Watashi wa' is dropped after the first sentence. It is understood from context.

readingText: わたしは ろくじに おきます。はちじに がっこうに いきます。がっこうで ほんを よみます。よじに うちに かえります。うちで えいがを みます。じゅうじに ねます。
textInTargetLanguage: わたしは ろくじに おきます。はちじに がっこうに いきます。がっこうで ほんを よみます。よじに うちに かえります。うちで えいがを みます。じゅうじに ねます。
baseLanguageSupportText: I wake up at 6 o'clock. At 8 o'clock, I go to school. I read a book at school. At 4 o'clock, I return home. I watch a movie at home. I sleep at 10 o'clock.

glossary.targetText: ろくじに おきます

exampleSentence.targetText: わたしは ろくじに おきます。

glossary.targetText: がっこうに いきます

exampleSentence.targetText: がっこうで ほんを よみます。
exampleSentence.baseTranslation: I read a book at school.

glossary.targetText: うちに かえります

sentenceSupportPairs.targetText: はちじに がっこうに いきます。
sentenceSupportPairs.baseTranslation: I go to school at 8 o'clock.

sentenceSupportPairs.targetText: がっこうで ほんを よみます。
sentenceSupportPairs.baseTranslation: I read a book at school.

sentenceSupportPairs.targetText: うちで えいがを みます。
sentenceSupportPairs.baseTranslation: I watch a movie at home.

comprehensionQuestions.questionText: What time does the author go to school?
Which particle is used to mark the time '10 o'clock'?
What does the author do AT home (Uchi de)?
Which particle is used after 'Uchi' to indicate the location where the movie is watched?

expectedSummaryPoints: Wakes up at 6, goes to school at 8.
Returns home at 4, watches a movie, sleeps at 10.

feedbackRules.onPass: Great reading! You successfully interpreted the particles and verbs.
feedbackRules.onFail: Review the particles. Remember: 'de' is where an action happens. 'ni' is time or destination.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Almost there! Keep practicing the vocabulary to speed up your reading comprehension.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: わたしは ろくじに おきます。はちじに がっこうに いきます。がっこうで ほんを よみます。よじに うちに かえります。うちで えいがを みます。じゅうじに ねます。

hintText: Notice how 'Gakkou' is used twice. Once with 'ni' (going TO school) and once with 'de' (reading AT school).
commonMistakes: Confusing the location of action (de) with destination (ni).
